chapter_title.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

text: 4524 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ قَالَتْ لِزَوْجِهَا مَا رَأَيْتُ قَطُّ مِنْ وَجْهِكَ خَيْراً فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهَا ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4524 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
"Any woman who says to her husband, 'I have never seen any good from you,' then her deeds are rendered void."
